title: Pumpkinhead Dweller
description: You will be haunted by the terrifying Pumpkinhead Dweller, a long critter that will appear in your world once every certain amount of time
body:
With the installation of this mod you will have a new creepy creature named **Pumpkinhead Dweller**, which will appear occasionally in your world.

![Pumpkinhead Dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e78352bec1a10c14889835db403c9e3050b6378.png)

When you kill this creature, you will receive a pumpkin pie

[Dweller Trend]
